name: DS@GT ARC at ImageCLEFmed GANs 2026: Geometric Filtering for Privacy-Preserving CT Slice Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.20692v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present a privacy-preserving framework for synthetic lung CT slice generation developed for the Image-CLEFmed GANs 2026 challenge. The approach...
description: arXiv:2607.20692v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present a privacy-preserving framework for synthetic lung CT slice generation developed for the Image-CLEFmed GANs 2026 challenge. The approach combines Optimal Transport Conditional Flow Matching with privacy-oriented training and a post-generation "Supervisor" pipeline that filters generated candidates in learned geometric latent spaces usi...
author: Eric Regina, Richard Arnaud, Samir Hadi Cisneros
